subcodes.first_line: Say: O God of Names and Creator of heaven! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, the All-Subduing over all things, through which was opened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک باسمک المهیمن علی الاشیاء الذی به فتح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Manifestation of God as sun, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @living waters; water of life
